summary:
Claim: Children with tetralogy of Fallot typically use squatting during cyanotic spells to alleviate symptoms.  
Evidence: - Squatting increases systemic vascular resistance, reducing right-to-left shunting via decreased venous return to the right side of the heart. - It is a well-documented reflexive behavior observed clinically during tet spells.  
Answer: C
